description: When activated, you will take 25% less damage from most attacks, and all skills will cost 25% less SP.
name: Lower Game Difficulty

description: Reverts the game back to its default difficulty. You will take full damage from enemy Skills, and your own will cost 100% SP instead of 75%.
name: Increase Game Difficulty

description: Cracked and broken from Yurasa's fall. On the bright side, at least you can't hear T-2 anymore.
name: Yurasa's Phone

description: A quick introduction to Elovia's three paths of Skills. This will become more expansive as you level up and unlock new Skills.
name: Guide: Elovia

description: A quick introduction to Yurasa's three paths of Skills. This will become more expansive as you level up and unlock new Skills.
name: Guide: Yurasa

description: Restores 225 HP.
name: Can Be Used Twice Test
note:
<Sort Priority: 3>
<Instant Cast>


<setup action>

opacity all actors: 50, 8
opacity target: 255, 8
 
 zoom: 125%, 10
  camera focus: target, center, 15
  clear battle log
  display action
  immortal: targets, true
  
  perform start
  
  cast animation
  wait for animation
</setup action>

<whole action>
  perform action
  motion wait: user
  action animation
  animation wait: 12
  action effect
  death break
</whole action>

<target action>
</target action>

<follow action>

</follow action>

<finish action>
  immortal: targets, false
  wait for new line
  clear battle log
  perform finish
  
  wait for movement
  wait for effect
  action common event
 opacity all actors: 255, 10
</finish action>

description: Change Elovia's 1st Skill between \I[1]\c[27]Firestrike\c[0], \I[2]\c[28]Wildfire\c[0] and \I[3]\c[29]Burning Aegis\c[0]. Can also be activated by pressing [1] while out of menus.
name: Configure 1st Skill: Elovia

description: Change Elovia's 2nd Skill between \I[1]\c[27]Flamespear\c[0], \I[2]\c[28]Berserk\c[0]and \I[3]\c[29]Radiance\c[0]. Can also be activated by pressing [2] while out of menus.
name: Configure 2nd Skill: Elovia

description: Change Elovia's 3rd Skill between \I[1]\c[27]Horizon's Wings\c[0], \I[2]\c[28]Expel\c[0]and \I[3]\c[29]Defiance\c[0]. Can also be activated by pressing [3] while out of menus.
name: Configure 3rd Skill: Elovia

description: Change Elovia's 4th Skill between \I[1]\c[27]Dancing Inferno\c[0], \I[2]\c[28]Incinerate\c[0]and \I[3]\c[29]Vanguard's Light\c[0]. Can also be activated by pressing [4] while out of menus.
name: Configure 4th Skill: Elovia

description: Change Yurasa's 1st Skill between \I[5]\c[14]Mend Wounds\c[0], \I[6]\c[15]Cabal's Voice\c[0] and \I[7]\c[26]Riftspark\c[0]. Can also be activated by pressing [R] while out of menus.
name: Configure 1st Skill: Yurasa

description: Change Yurasa's 2nd Skill between \I[5]\c[14]Static Field\c[0], \I[6]\c[15]Maelstrom\c[0] and \I[7]\c[26]Gateway\c[0]. Can also be activated by pressing [T] while out of menus.
name: Configure 2nd Skill: Yurasa

description: Change Yurasa's 3rd Skill between \I[5]\c[14]Rend\c[0], \I[6]\c[15]Antimage\c[0] and \I[7]\c[26]Inspire\c[0]. Can also be activated by pressing [Y] while out of menus.
name: Configure 3rd Skill: Yurasa

description: Change Yurasa's 4th Skill between \I[5]\c[14]Sustain\c[0], \I[6]\c[15]Hololight\c[0] and \I[7]\c[26]Dimensionless Space\c[0]. Can also be activated by pressing [Y] while out of menus.
name: Configure 4th Skill: Yurasa

description: Kills Everything
name: Kill
note:
Skill #1 will be used when you select
the Attack command.
<Bypass Taunt>
<Bypass Barrier>
<setup action>

opacity not focus: 115, 5
 
  clear battle log
  display action
  immortal: targets, true
  
  perform start

  action animation
  animation wait: 18
  action effect
shake screen: 7, 8, 8
  death break
</whole action>

  immortal: targets, false
  wait for new line
  clear battle log
  perform finish
  
  wait for movement
  wait for effect
  action common event
 opacity not focus: 255, 5
</finish action>

description: Scans an enemy, revealing its stats alongside other information. \c[17]Using this doesn't end your turn\c[0].
name: Evil Eye
note:
<Text Color: 17>

<Before Eval>
var nmeId = target.isEnemy() ? target.enemyId() : 0;
$gameVariables.setValue(20, nmeId);  // store in variable 1
$gameVariables.setValue(19, target.index());
</Before Eval>

description: Has a chance to drop from Drones. Can be broken down for S at Fabricators. Looks around for a short moment even after its owner's expiry.
name: Drone Eye

description: Has a chance to drop from Walkers. Can be broken down for S at Fabricators. The inside is a mess of wires and lights.
name: Walker Head

description: Has a chance to drop from Sentinels. Can be broken down for S at Fabricators. Sparks on occasion, but that's probably fine.
name: Sentinel Tendrils

description: Has a chance to drop from Wasps. Can be broken down for S at Fabricators. Just looking at it makes you hear the annoying chatter of Wasps in your head.
name: Wasp Speaker

description: Has a chance to drop from Mimics. Can be broken down for S at Fabricators. Heavier than it looks.
name: Mimic Lock

description: Has a chance to drop from Crushers. Can be broken down for S at Fabricators. Blinks feverishly after being severed.
name: Crusher Eye

description: Has a chance to drop from Wisteria. Can be broken down for S at Fabricators. Feels springy and warm.
name: Wisteria Fibres

description: Has a chance to drop from Tunicates. Can be broken down for S at Fabricators. Continues to beat, even after being severed.
name: Tunicate Heart

description: Has a chance to drop from Heimlichs. Can be broken down for S at Fabricators. Feels leathery and rough.
name: Heimlich Flower

description: Found in an old closet, grants limited access around the ARC-TEC facility.
name: ARC-TEC Keycard Level 4

description: Assorted bits and bobs found throughout the Arc-Tec facility. Could be broken down to make other items, perhaps.
name: Junk

description: It's scrawled in felt-tip.
name: Odd Map

description: A strange robot found in the old room of Maren Nathaira. Comes with a little control terminal and cute voice.
name: "Subnautical Steve"

description: A small transparent container, filled with a miniscule amount of bright blue liquid.
name: Dimensional Energy Container

description: This ink scrawling describes five alleged "Symbols of Power".
name: Paper With Symbols

description: Sets the music played during most battles to Radiance.
name: Set BGM: Radiance

description: Sets the music played during most battles to Lightning Instincts.
name: Set BGM: Lightning Instincts

description: Sets the music played during most battles to ADAM.
name: Set BGM: ADAM
